message:
style(lab): rustfmt reformatting and import cleanup

Apply consistent formatting across lab and test modules.

- Reformat multi-line method chains in mutation.rs to standard rustfmt style
- Add use imports for EscalationPolicy/RestartPolicy replacing crate:: prefixes
- Expand single-line struct/method bodies to multi-line in runner.rs
- Reformat function signatures and closures in property_geodesic_normalization.rs
- Reorder imports alphabetically
- Minor formatting adjustments in lab/mod.rs

No semantic or behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
